prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Kleemann K-55 Supercharger Pulley Kit** (M113K engine) reducing the pulley diameter to 2.5" for a 1.5-2.0 PSI boost increase, paired with a **Weistec Engineering 3.0L Supercharger Upgrade** featuring a ported supercharger housing and high-flow rotors to support 700+ HP on 93 octane with a **Weistec Stage 3 ECU flash** (M113K-specific, not generic)

Install a **Gintani M113K Full Race Intercooler Kit** with dual 4.5" bar-and-plate cores and 3.5" mandrel-bent aluminum piping, replacing the restrictive OEM plastic charge pipes with **Weistec Engineering CNC-machined aluminum charge pipes** to eliminate heat soak and maintain consistent IATs under sustained boost

Replace the OEM M113K fuel system with a **Radium Engineering M113K Port Injection Kit** (dual 1700cc injectors per bank) and a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump**, paired with a **Motec M150 ECU** for full flex-fuel capability (E85 compatible) and individual cylinder trimming to address the M113K's inherent bank-to-bank AFR discrepancies
estetica: Fit a **Rocket Bunny V2 SL-Class Widebody Kit** (R129 chassis-specific, not R230) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, retaining the OEM pop-up headlights while adding **Seibon Carbon SL55 AMG Hood** with a functional central vent for heat extraction

Install **Ohlins Road & Track Coilovers (R129-specific)** with adjustable camber plates and 24-way damping adjustment, paired with **H&R Sport Springs (R129 SL55 AMG-specific)** for a 30mm drop, and **Meyle HD Control Arms** with polyurethane bushings to correct suspension geometry under lowered ride height

Replace the OEM 18" AMG wheels with **BBS LM-R 19x9.5 ET25 (front) and 19x11 ET30 (rear)** in gold finish, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear)**, paired with **AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** (355mm front, 330mm rear) for track-capable stopping power
